description: Operate rubber hose cutting scales, verify material lot tags, and slice hoses to 234±2mm or 94±2mm with clean, thread-free edges.
Handle PVC + NBR protector tubes, perform automated cutter setups, slice sleeves to 190±3mm, and verify lengths using calipers.
Align protective shrink-sleeves onto metal pipe assemblies and bake them in HMI-controlled curing ovens at 155°C±10°C for at least 5.5 minutes.
Operate hydraulic bending fixture BNF-IYM-02, execute line bending profiles, and check relative angles using custom inspection gauges.
Operate EF02 bending blocks, set left-side and up-side bending parameters (L-R Setting -L80, height -274), and inspect pins visually.
Set up CJ-22 crimping machines, verify crimping diameters to 9.00±0.05mm using micrometers, and monitor hydraulic pressure gauges at 6-7 Mpa.
Apply ACME Plastics protector sleeves onto rubber hose sections and secure them with adhesive bonding jigs BJ-IYM-22-1A/B.
Utilize calibrated torque wrenches TOJ-IYM-22-A/B to tighten connections to 12-17Nm and inspect threads for damages.
Mount assemblies onto automated leak test benches, run pressure cycles at 15.2+1.0/-0 MPa for 36 seconds, and inspect for pressure drops.
Perform final inspection checks on jig FI-IYM-22, sign off QC pass stamps, verify lot numbers, and pack assemblies into blue bins.
